privileged_info_summary: This is a Docker Compose reverse-engineering task for an inventory-tracker application with 4 services: inv-db (postgres:14), inv-cache (redis:7-alpine), inv-api (custom Python 3.11-slim Flask app with psycopg2 and redis), and inv-web (nginx:1.24-alpine). Services are deployed across two Docker networks: inv-backend (database, cache, API) and inv-frontend (API, web). The inv-api exposes Flask endpoints /api/status and /api/items at http://localhost:8080. Data is synthetic, created entirely by the task setup script. All base images are official Docker images. Scoring passes at 60 points or higher.
